parameters.query:
SELECT
  a.id,
  a.appointment_type,
  a.google_meet_link,
  p.first_name,
  p.email,
  TO_CHAR(a.scheduled_at AT TIME ZONE 'America/Bogota', 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS date,
  TO_CHAR(a.scheduled_at AT TIME ZONE 'America/Bogota', 'HH12:MI AM') AS time
FROM appointments a
JOIN patients p ON a.patient_id = p.id
WHERE a.status IN ('scheduled', 'confirmed')
  AND a.deleted_at IS NULL
  AND a.scheduled_at BETWEEN NOW() + INTERVAL '23 hours' AND NOW() + INTERVAL '25 hours'
  AND p.email IS NOT NULL

SELECT
  a.id,
  a.appointment_type,
  a.google_meet_link,
  p.first_name,
  p.email,
  TO_CHAR(a.scheduled_at AT TIME ZONE 'America/Bogota', 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS date,
  TO_CHAR(a.scheduled_at AT TIME ZONE 'America/Bogota', 'HH12:MI AM') AS time
FROM appointments a
JOIN patients p ON a.patient_id = p.id
WHERE a.status IN ('scheduled', 'confirmed')
  AND a.deleted_at IS NULL
  AND a.scheduled_at BETWEEN NOW() + INTERVAL '50 minutes' AND NOW() + INTERVAL '70 minutes'
  AND p.email IS NOT NULL

parameters.subject: =📅 Recordatorio: Tu cita es mañana [{{ $json.date }}]
parameters.message:
=Hola {{ $json.first_name }},

Te recordamos que tenés una cita MAÑANA.

📅 Fecha: {{ $json.date }}
⏰ Hora: {{ $json.time }}
💻 Tipo: {{ $json.appointment_type }}{{ $json.google_meet_link ? '
🔗 Meet: ' + $json.google_meet_link : '' }}

Por favor confirmá tu asistencia haciendo click:

✅ CONFIRMAR asistencia
{{ $env.WEBHOOK_URL }}/webhook/confirm/{{ $json.id }}?action=confirmar

❌ CANCELAR cita
{{ $env.WEBHOOK_URL }}/webhook/confirm/{{ $json.id }}?action=cancelar

Saludos
